versions.version_description: complete version, chords closer to original

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]F7[/ch]
   You and me we made a vow[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F7[/ch]
   For better or for worse[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F7[/ch]
   I can't believe you let me down[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
But the proof is in the way it hurts[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F7[/ch]
   For months on end I've had my doubts[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F7[/ch]
   Denying every tear[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F7[/ch]
   I wish this would be over now[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
   But I know that I still need you here[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F7[/ch]
You say I'm crazy[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F7[/ch]
Cause you don't think I know what you've done[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F7[/ch]
But when you call me baby[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
I know I'm not the only one[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F7[/ch]
   You've been so unavailable[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F7[/ch]
   Now sadly I know why[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F7[/ch]
   Your heart is unobtainable[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
Even though lord knows you have mine[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F7[/ch]
You say I'm crazy[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F7[/ch]
Cause you don't think I know what you've done[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F7[/ch]
But when you call me baby[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
I know I'm not the only one[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F7[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
   I have loved you for many years[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Maybe I am just not enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F7[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
   You've made me realise my deepest fear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                 
By lying and tearing us up[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F7[/ch]
